title: California HS Wrestling Rankings
notes: Ratings include the 2026 CAUSAW freestyle state event folded in at 0.65 weight (85 both-on-board bouts). Junior National Duals and Kids Nationals contributed 0 (structural). Freestyle applied as a post-season Glicko-2 rating period; folkstyle H2H tiebreaks preserved for wrestlers who did not compete in freestyle. Record column still reflects folkstyle-tracked H2H only. Record column = combined tracked H2H (folkstyle carank + CAUSAW freestyle).
